OOTBParameterization.QUCParameterization: Change Management

If the value is Mandatory, Change Management process must be used to Release\Revise\Obsolete Controlled Documents. If it is Optional, user can choose to use or not use Change process, for each document.
Mandatory
Optional
Enable Author to promote Frozen\Released Controlled Documents.
Allows Author role to promote Controlled Documents that are in the In Approval and Approved states.
Enable Attribute Groups with Local Copy.
Allows Attribute Groups with Local Copy.
Show all documents in organization for Leader
Show all documents in organization for Leader
Enable File Categories
Enable File Categories
Supersede Previous Revision on Release of Document
Supersede Previous Revision on Release of Document
If Supersede Previous Revision On Release is set to TRUE, the previous revision of the Controlled Document is automatically promoted to Superseded state when the next revision is released

Days
